title: athyrium × megayakusimense
intro: Athyrium × megayakusimense is a hybrid species of fern, specifically a cross between Athyrium yokosukense and Athyrium niponicum. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Athyrium × megayakusimense are numerous, with potential uses in treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In traditional herbal preparations, Athyrium × megayakusimense is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
